name: cloudflare
description: Skills for the Cloudflare developer platform: Workers, Durable Objects, Agents SDK, MCP servers, Wrangler CLI, and web performance

interface.shortDescription: Build on Cloudflare with skills and MCP servers
interface.longDescription: Use Cloudflare's skills and MCP servers to build on the Cloudflare developer platform, including Workers, Durable Objects, the Agents SDK, Wrangler CLI, and web performance workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Cloudflare's skills and MCP servers to help me build or debug a Worker with the right bindings, deployment flow, and best practices.
